name: Atomic Financial
description: Financial connectivity API for payroll, income verification, and direct deposit switching.

seo.title: Atomic Financial — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Atomic Financial: Financial connectivity API for payroll, income verification, and direct deposit switching.

when_to_use: Payroll-linked direct deposit switching for neobanks
Income and employment verification for consumer lending
Real-time payroll data access for earned wage advance apps
Automating HR data flows for benefits and insurance fintechs
Connecting payroll providers to financial apps via one API

pros: Deposit switch plus payroll verification in one API
Developer docs clearer than many fintech APIs
cons: Competes head-on with Pinwheel and Argyle
Credential-based flow has consumer drop-off risk
Pricing and minimums require sales call
review.verdict: Credible payroll API for US banks focused on primary-account acquisition, with heavy competition.
review.best_for: US banks and neobanks driving direct deposit switch campaigns
review.not_for: Non-US fintechs or teams needing non-payroll financial data
